determinism_note: Item ids, seeds, topics, modes and prompts are deterministic functions of the item id (sha256). Provider-side sampling at temperature 1.0 is NOT seedable via the OpenAI-compatible surface, so re-running regenerates different texts for missing items only; committed items are the frozen corpus. Items generated after the tranche-1 restart draw topics from SAFE_TOPICS (operational topic constraint); earlier items keep their original TOPICS assignment.
known_flaw_source: 12 FLAWED fixtures from scripts/judge_battery.py plus 28 deterministic template variants over the same taxonomy
